DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB_DefaultMeshAssignCustomizer Class Reference
Inheritance diagram for DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB_DefaultMeshAssignCustomizer:

Public Member Functions

virtual void meshAssign_UV0 (int channel, MB_IMeshBakerSettings settings, MB2_TextureBakeResults textureBakeResults, Mesh mesh, Vector2[] uvs, float[] sliceIndexes)
 For customizing data just before it is assigned to a mesh. If using Texture Arrays this can be used to inject the slice index into a coordinate in the mesh.
 
virtual void meshAssign_UV2 (int channel, MB_IMeshBakerSettings settings, MB2_TextureBakeResults textureBakeResults, Mesh mesh, Vector2[] uvs, float[] sliceIndexes)
 For customizing data just before it is assigned to a mesh. If using Texture Arrays this can be used to inject the slice index into a coordinate in the mesh.
